---
title: "Introduction to R for Data Analysis"
subtitle: "Workshop by Selina Baldauf"
number-sections: false
---

This workshop equips beginners with essential R skills for data processing and visualization. Every session is followed by hands-on exercises, and Day 4 is dedicated to applying what you've learned to your own research data. No prior programming experience required.

::: {.callout-note}
## Before you start
Please complete the [preparations](preparations.qmd) before Day 1 to ensure a smooth workshop start.
:::

## Schedule

| | Date | Time |
|---|---|---|
| 📅 Day 1 | Monday, 9 March 2026 | 9:00 – 16:00 |
| 📅 Day 2 | Tuesday, 10 March 2026 | 9:00 – 16:00 |
| 📅 Day 3 | Monday, 16 March 2026 | 9:00 – 16:00 |
| 📅 Day 4 | Tuesday, 17 March 2026 | 9:00 – 16:00 |


```{=html}
<script src="timer_solution.js"></script>
<script>
window.addEventListener("load", function () {
  const date_now = new Date();
  const day_classes = ["r_day1_content", "r_day2_content", "r_day3_content"];
  for (let i = 0; i < session_end_times.length; i++) {
    if (date_now >= session_end_times[i]) {
      var els = document.getElementsByClassName(day_classes[i]);
      for (let j = 0; j < els.length; j++) {
        els[j].style.display = "block";
      }
    }
  }
});
</script>
```

### Day 1 — R and RStudio Basics, Reading Data

*The task solution script will be available for download here after the session.*

::: {.r_day1_content}
[Download Day 1 R script](R/Tasks/Day1.R){download="Day1.R"}
:::

- [Organization](sessions/slides/00_organization.qmd)
- [Introduction to RStudio](sessions/01_intro-rstudio.qmd)
- [Introduction to R](sessions/02_intro-r.qmd)
- [Data frames & tibbles](sessions/04_data-tibbles.qmd)
- [Tidyverse and readr](sessions/05_readr.qmd)
- [Common R errors](sessions/06_common-errors.qmd)

### Day 2 — Data Visualization and Transformation

*The task solution script will be available for download here after the session.*

::: {.r_day2_content}
[Download Day 2 R script](R/Tasks/Day2.R){download="Day2.R"}
:::

- [Data visualization with ggplot2](sessions/07_ggplot.qmd)
- [Data transformation with dplyr](sessions/08_dplyr.qmd)
- [Good practice coding](sessions/11_good-practice.qmd)

### Day 3 — Tidy Data and Statistics

*The task solution script will be available for download here after the session.*

::: {.r_day3_content}
[Download Day 3 R script](R/Tasks/Day3.R){download="Day3.R"}
:::

- [Tidy data with tidyr](sessions/09_tidyr.qmd)
- [Statistical tests](sessions/10_tests.qmd)
- [AI Tools](sessions/12_AI-tools.qmd) 

### Day 4 — Bring Your Own Data

Apply what you've learned to your own research data, with instructor support throughout the day.

- [Bring Your Own Data](sessions/byod.qmd)
